case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,153.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
